# The 3Dmodels of Kitchen karrot's cocktails
by Fanbaoxianyu
### Kitchen Karrot download:[https://modrinth.com/mod/kitchen-karrot](https://modrinth.com/mod/kitchen-karrot)
# Kitchen Karrot Cocktails 3D Models
This texture pack enhances the visual appearance of various in-game items, specifically focusing on drinks and bottles. The texture pack adds detailed and colorful designs to the drinks, making them look more realistic and visually appealing. The drinks are displayed on a wooden shelf with glowing lights, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere. The texture pack also includes detailed bottles and other decorative elements, adding to the overall aesthetic of the game. This texture pack significantly improves the visual experience of Kitchen karrot, making the game more immersive and enjoyable for players who appreciate detailed and high-quality textures.
